---
name: Installation problem
about: The release bundle, Homebrew/Scoop manifest, or Docker image did not install or start
title: "[Install]: "
labels: installation
---

## Install method

- [ ] Release bundle (direct download)
- [ ] Homebrew formula
- [ ] Scoop manifest
- [ ] Docker / GHCR image
- [ ] Built from source

## Platform

- OS and version:
- Architecture (x64 / ARM64 / Apple silicon):

## What happened

The exact command you ran and the full error output (redact usernames in paths
if you prefer).

## Expected

What you expected to happen, if it isn't obvious.
